Functions for initializing and managing watchface events and settings in Pebble firmware.

# Purpose
This header file defines the interface for managing a watchface application. It includes function declarations for initializing the watchface with [`watchface_init`](<#watchface_init>), handling button events through [`watchface_handle_button_event`](<#watchface_handle_button_event>), and managing the default application installation ID with [`watchface_set_default_install_id`](<#watchface_set_default_install_id>) and [`watchface_get_default_install_id`](<#watchface_get_default_install_id>). The file also provides functions to launch the default watchface using a specified animation with [`watchface_launch_default`](<#watchface_launch_default>), start a low power mode with [`watchface_start_low_power`](<#watchface_start_low_power>), and reset the click manager using [`watchface_reset_click_manager`](<#watchface_reset_click_manager>). The file includes necessary headers for event handling, application installation management, and compositor services.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `kernel/events.h`
- `process_management/app_install_manager.h`
- `services/common/compositor/compositor.h`
